💗

Sirf Aapke Liye,
Teena 🌸

Yeh waqt mushkil hai, par aap akeli nahi hain —
har pal mein aapke saath hoon.

↓   scroll karo   ↓

Khayal Aapka

Aapke liye kuch zaroori baatein 💌

🌡️

Warmth lena na bhuolein

Heating pad ya warm water bottle se pet ki sekai karein — bahut aram milta hai.

🍵

Garam chai peejiye

Ginger ya chamomile chai cramps mein relief deti hai. Aap deserve karti hain sab achha.

🛏️

Aram karo, please

Yeh din aapke liye rest ke din hain. Apna khayal rakhna sabse pehli zimmedaari hai.

💧

Paani bahut zaroori hai

Thodi thodi der mein pani peeti rahein. Hydrated rehna mood aur energy dono improve karta hai.

🍫

Dark chocolate is okay!

Thoda sa dark chocolate mood lift karta hai aur iron bhi deta hai. Aap le sakti hain! 😄

🫶

Main hoon aapke saath

Jab bhi kuch chahiye — ek call, ek message — main wahan hoon. Hamesha.

Humare Pal

Kuch yaadein jo dil ke paas hain 📸

Humare Haseen Pal ♥
Saath Mein 🌸
Meri Jaan 💗
Yeh Pal Hamesha Yaad Rahenge 💕
Hamari Kahani 🌹
Dil Se Dil Tak 💓
Aap Meri Duniya Hain 🌙
Hamesha Aapke Saath 💞

Mere Vaade

4 Vaade — Sirf Aapke Liye 🤝

  • 01 Main hamesha aapka samman karoonga — aap meri izzat hain.
  • 02 Main hamesha aapka khayal rakhunga — aapki khushi meri khushi hai.
  • 03 Main kabhi bhi aapko ignore nahi karoonga — aap meri priority hain.
  • 04 Main har situation mein aapke saath rahunga — mushkil ho ya aasaan, hamesha.

Dil Ki Baat

Ek Tohfa — Sirf Aapke Liye 🎁

🎀

Ek khaas tohfa aapke liye

Click karein aur kholein 💕

~ Kaise Bataoon Main Tumhe ~
Kaise bataoon main tumhe Mere liye tum kaun ho, Kaises bataoon main tumhe Tum dhadkanon ka geet ho Jeevan ka tum sangeet ho Tum zindagi, tum bandagi Tum roshni, tum taazgi Tum har khushi, tum pyaar ho Tum preet ho, manmeet ho Aankhon mein tum, yaadon mein tum Saanson mein tum, aahon mein tum Neendon mein tum, khwaabon mein tum Ho meri har baat mein tum Ho mere din raat mein tum Tum subah mein, tum shaam mein Tum soch mein, tum kaam mein Mere liye paana bhi tum Mere liye khona bhi tum Mere liye hansna bhi tum Mere liye rona bhi tum Aur jagaana sona bhi tum Jaaoon kahin, dekhoon kahin Tum ho wahan, tum ho wahin Kaise bataoon main tumhe Tum bin to main kuchh bhi nahi!
💗 🌸 💗

Aap bahut special hain, Teena 🌷

Yeh waqt guzar jaayega — par mera pyaar kabhi nahi.
Apna khayal rakhna, please. Aap meri duniya hain.
